title: MCCI Compact Fishing Message
description: More compact fishing messages for server MCC Island.
body: More compact fishing messages for server MCC Island (and with other functions). **All settings can be customized via Mod Menu or by pressing K.** _Due to personal reasons, I do not plan to continue supporting the development of this mod. If anyone is interested in taking over, feel free to contact me on GitHub._ ## Feature: ### Compact Fishing Messages: - Removes all trigger text and XP message, retains the icon after the caught message. - Assigns unique icons to different categories of fishing items, differs normal fish and elusive fish. ![sample](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28eedd1b32f5424dcd4492ce1ac6ea791327a4fa.png) ### Treasure Unboxing Summary: - Disable default receive messages(Optional) and replace them with a concise unboxing summary. - Usage: Start recording unboxing events with the command ```\TreasureOpenEvent creat```, after completing unboxing use ```\TreasureOpenEvent stop``` to generate summary. ![sample](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/026025a63411a13705c971919d58338423d61c73.png) ### Fish Record Overlay: - Displays statistics on screen during fishing: time elapsed，total reel-ins, XP gained, counts of each item. - The overlay resets each time the client restarts. - Overlay position, size, and colors can be fully customized via Mod Menu. ### Equipment Overlay: - Displays bait, line, and Overclocks on-screen after each switch. - Tracks line uses and Unstable Overclock timers. ![sample](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dbb8153ac304442d4ef271c62c79b6eba5f2a83_0.webp) ## Other: Submit bugs/suggestions [here](https://github.com/Wandering-Star71/MCCI-Compact-Fishing-Message/issues). Check code branches of supported version(1.21.*) [here](https://github.com/Wandering-Star71/MCCI-Compact-Fishing-Message). Star this project for mythic gargantuan fish.
